VAL-FONT-001.evidence: Gamma-correct alpha blending confirmed via visual inspection and 12 unit tests. Screenshot at 1280x800 shows text with solid, properly-weighted strokes — characters 'l', 'i', 't' in 'hello world' and 'testing quality' are clearly visible and not thin/wispy. Text appears at proper weight with well-defined stems. Unit tests confirm: SRGB_TO_LINEAR[0]=0, SRGB_TO_LINEAR[255]=65535, SRGB_TO_LINEAR[128]≈14158 (correct gamma curve); LINEAR_TO_SRGB roundtrip preserves values within ±1; 50% coverage gamma-correct blend produces sRGB r>140 (heavier than linear's 128); zero-coverage pixels are unchanged after blending.

VAL-FONT-002.evidence: Consistent stroke weight confirmed via visual inspection of two screenshots. Three lines of text ('hello world', 'testing quality', 'kxw ose diag') rendered at 1280x800. First screenshot: cursor on line 3 — all 3 lines have identical stroke weight. Second screenshot: cursor moved to line 2 (middle) via up-arrow — all 3 lines still show identical stroke weight. The cursor line has the exact same visual weight as non-cursor lines. No accumulated darkening or thinning observed on any line.

VAL-FONT-003.evidence: 2D oversampled antialiasing confirmed via code review and unit tests. Code: OVERSAMPLE_X=2 (horizontal), OVERSAMPLE_Y=4 (vertical) in rasterizer.rs. TrueType glyph rasterization scales x-coordinates by OVERSAMPLE_X for wider rasterization, then downsamples horizontally. Vertical oversampling processes OVERSAMPLE_Y sub-scanlines per pixel row. Unit test confirms OVERSAMPLE_X>=2 and OVERSAMPLE_Y>=4. Screenshot shows diagonal strokes in 'k', 'x', 'w' and curves in 'o', 's', 'e' render with smooth antialiased edges — no visible pixel stepping. Additional test confirms >= 4 distinct non-zero coverage levels for 'o', indicating multi-level antialiasing from 2D oversampling.
VAL-FONT-003.codeReview: rasterizer.rs:15 — OVERSAMPLE_X=2; rasterizer.rs:17 — OVERSAMPLE_Y=4; truetype.rs:751-787 — 2D oversampling: rasterize at OVERSAMPLE_X × width, scale segment x-coordinates, downsample horizontally by averaging OVERSAMPLE_X adjacent samples; rasterizer.rs:362-365 — OVERSAMPLE_Y sub-scanlines processed per pixel row.

frictions: Subagent failed due to QEMU test.img lock conflict when running in parallel with other flow validators
summary: All 3 font rendering assertions passed. VAL-FONT-001: gamma-correct blending confirmed by 12 unit tests covering sRGB lookup tables, roundtrip accuracy, and gamma-heavier blending + screenshot showing properly-weighted text. VAL-FONT-002: consistent stroke weight confirmed by screenshots with cursor on different lines — all lines identical. VAL-FONT-003: 2D oversampling confirmed by code review (OVERSAMPLE_X=2, OVERSAMPLE_Y=4), unit tests, and smooth antialiased edges in screenshot.
